curation.synopsis: Mars has been lost. The fall of the Forge World Principal came so fast and so cleanly that Rogal Dorn was forced to throw a blockade around the Red Planet rather than admit how deep the corruption ran. Now Malcador the Sigillite has decided that containment is not enough — Mars must be sterilised. Dravian Klayde, a Raven Guard techmarine elevated to Knight-Errant, infiltrates the planet as the Schism boils over and is left the lone survivor of a butchered loyalist enclave. With the Sigillite he conceives a final-solution weapon: free an imprisoned heretek and unleash his army of sentient cybernetica engines on every living thing on Mars. The novella turns on the rules a desperate Imperium will break to win, and on the cost of being the man Malcador chose to break them.
